overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a knight character first observing the massive golden Erdtree from a rocky mountain overlook, then transitioning to the misty Finger Ruins of Rhia where the character explores a surreal landscape with floating blue lights and towering rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with ancient ruins and view of the Erdtree

events.description: camera begins panning upward to reveal the full scale of the golden Erdtree against the stormy sky

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rocky outcrop, looking up at the Erdtree while equipped with a shield and glowing item in hand

entered.detail: moss-covered rocky ground with yellow lichen patches
leafless brown trees scattered across the mountainside
crumbling stone columns and arches from a forgotten civilization
massive glowing golden tree dominating the skyline with branching limbs
tall grey rock formations framing the view

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a knight in armor standing on a rocky mountain overlook surrounded by dead trees and ancient stone ruins. As the camera pans upward, the massive golden Erdtree is revealed towering against a stormy overcast sky, backlit by ethereal golden light.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyward view of the golden Erdtree between mountain peaks

events.description: player character moves out of frame to the right as camera continues panning upward
screen fades to black transitioning to a new location

agents.ego_description: character is no longer visible as the camera focuses entirely on the Erdtree and stormy sky

segments.scene_description: With the character exited from the frame, the camera continues its upward pan to focus entirely on the massive Erdtree glowing between the mountain cliffs. The scene ends with a fade to black as storm clouds gather around the tree's upper branches.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain valley known as the Finger Ruins of Rhia with floating blue lights

events.description: fade in to new location with misty atmosphere and floating blue gravitational lights
location text 'Finger Ruins of Rhia' appears at bottom left of the screen
character begins walking forward through the ruins toward a cave entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the misty valley wearing a dark cloak, observing the floating blue lights and approaching a dark cave entrance

entered.detail: jagged grey rock formations rising vertically on both sides of the valley
small glowing blue particles floating in the air throughout the scene
dark opening in the rock wall leading underground

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene reveals the Finger Ruins of Rhia, a misty mountain valley with floating blue lights and towering rock spires. The character, now wearing a dark cloak, walks forward through the surreal landscape as location text appears, approaching a dark cave entrance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous visual progression from a desolate mountain overlook dominated by a celestial golden glow to a surreal, misty valley filled with ethereal blue light. It begins with a knight in armor standing among dead trees and ancient ruins, as the camera pans upward to reveal the massive, glowing Erdtree towering against a stormy overcast sky. The camera continues its ascent, leaving the character behind to focus entirely on the tree's luminous branches before the scene fades into darkness as storm clouds gather. Following this transition, the environment shifts to the Finger Ruins of Rhia, where the lighting turns cool and misty among towering rock spires and floating blue lights. The scene concludes as a cloaked character walks forward through this otherworldly landscape toward a dark cave entrance.
